title: [ImportVerilog] Use type predicates for handle comparisons

features.name: chandle equality comparison
features.description: Code should include a chandle variable equality comparison using the == operator

features.name: class handle equality comparison
features.description: Code should include a class handle equality comparison where two class-typed variables are compared with ==

features.name: non-monomorphized class handle equality comparison
features.description: Code should include equality comparison of handles to a non-monomorphized (forward-declared) class type using the == or != operator

features.name: static method returning class instance used in handle comparison
features.description: Code should include a static method that returns a class instance, where the return value is compared via == with a static class member variable
